summary: Vertical video, phone-style coverage of Trump and accompanying dignitaries at the foot of Air Force One on a red carpet, flanked by a costumed honor guard and young people waving flags, during the Beijing welcome ceremony. It is continuous footage of a single ceremony (low music_score 0.4, ambient or ceremony sound) with no montage editing, overlays, or stylized editing.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS is presented with flowers as a welcome to China'
